questionHtml: Use Prim’s algorithm to find the weight of the minimum spanning tree of the subgraph of G obtained by deleting A and starting at B. List the order in which the edges are selected.
markschemeHtml:
use of Prim’s algorithm                    M1

BC    46                A1

BD    58                A1

DE    23

EF    47

Total  174               A1


Note: Award M0A0A0A1 for 174 without correct working e.g. use of Kruskal’s, or with no working.
Award M1A0A0A1 for 174 by using Prim’s from an incorrect starting point.


[4 marks]

meta.title: Use Prim’s algorithm to find the weight of the minimum spanning tree of the subgraph of G obtained by deleting A and starting at B. List the order in which the edges are selected.
